name: Apple Kuchen
recipeIngredient: 8 large Granny Smith apples, peeled, cored, and cut into thick slices
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, mix together the butter, sugar, flour, baking powder, vanilla extract, and egg.
Pour half the batter into a greased 8-inch square baking pan and spread to cover the bottom.
In another large bowl, toss the apple slices with the remaining 4 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon, then place on top of the batter in the baking pan.
Spread the remaining batter over the apple mixture. Bake for 20 minutes, then sprinkle with almonds and bake for 30 more minutes.
